> This is for discussing an idea before drafting a full TIP. The TIP itself is a
> markdown file submitted as a pull request to [`tips/`](../../tips/README.md)
> using [`tips/TEMPLATE.md`](../../tips/TEMPLATE.md).

## Which protocol surface does this touch?

- [ ] Consensus / validation / opcodes / reject codes
- [ ] Asset / TLV / ICU / option-series formats
- [ ] Proof-of-inference / PoW / VDF / block format
- [ ] Economic parameters (genesis, supply, reward, difficulty)
- [ ] Cross-chain / settlement protocol
- [ ] Signatures / post-quantum

## Summary of the idea

## Why it needs to be a protocol change (not just a code change)

## Rough backwards-compatibility / activation thoughts
